source: ponytail benchmark — agentic (headless Claude Code editing a real FastAPI+React repo; Haiku 4.5, n=4, 12 feature tickets). README + benchmarks/results/2026-06-18-agentic.md
older_single_shot: 80-94% less code (isolated generation; a conversational-baseline artefact per issue #126 — the agentic figures above are the corrected, defensible version)
note: Published medians — a documented external constant (CLAUDE.md #8 exception), NOT a per-repo measurement. The cut is biggest where a real over-build trap exists (a date picker 404->23 lines, a color picker 287->23) and near zero on already-minimal code. Frugal is the only arm that cuts every metric while staying 100% safe.
